title: 第 83 節
en: Vasupfigya, name of the twelfth Tirthakara, 280.
Vátsaliya, name of two Kulas, 291, Váyubhüti, name of a Garzadhara, Vedana = feeling, 3 n 2.
Videha, native country of Mahavira, Videhadattà (‘dinna), name of Trisala, 193, 194, 256.
Vidyádhari, name of two Sakhas, Vigaya, name of a muhûrta, 199, Vihárabhümi, 9o n 1, 306.
Vimala, name of the thirteenth Tirthakara, 280.
Vimanavasin, one of the four orders of gods, 191.
Visâkhâ, name of an asterism, Visila, name of a palankin, 273.
Water-lives, 5 n r. Whirlpool = Samsara, 9. Wind-bodies, 9. Women, 21.
Yakshizi, name of a nun, 278. Yasas, 274.
Yasobhadra, name of a monk, 289. — name of a Kula, 29r.
